turns.user_message: Yesterday, I just stared at my to-do list for an hour. That never used to happen to me.
Now I feel that same blankness every single morning. I can't find any spark to get going anymore.
I'm completely numb to any deadline or accomplishment. It's like my motivation has been permanently switched off.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment. This used to not bother the speaker.
